name: Grubbs filter

func: var nodeId=msg._nodeId||msg.topic.replace(/-c$/,'');var latest=flow.get('rh_latest')||{};latest[nodeId]=msg.payload;flow.set('rh_latest',latest);var nodes=['bills-office','mud-room','garage'];var labels={'bills-office':'Bills Office','mud-room':'Mud Room','garage':'Garage'};var readings=nodes.map(function(n){return{label:labels[n],value:latest[n]!==undefined?latest[n].toFixed(1)+'%':'--'};});msg.payload=readings;return msg;
